title: Mark Twain: A Biography. Complete
author: Albert Bigelow Paine
evidence_summary: Useful for factual grounding: the biography consolidates Samuel Clemens's river years, lecture career, publishing fame, bankruptcy crisis, world travel, and the public performance persona that shaped how readers heard 'Mark Twain.'
notes: Public-domain biography suitable for open-source citation. Use as fact-layer evidence and as support for performance-oriented style traits; prefer original works when assigning rhetorical habits.
